Name: UCineCameraComponent
Description: A specialized version of a camera component, geared toward cinematic usage.

Variables.Name: FilmbackSettings
Variables.Description: Controls the filmback of the camera.

Variables.Name: CurrentFocalLength
Variables.Description: Current focal length of the camera (i.e. controls FoV, zoom)

Variables.Name: CurrentAperture
Variables.Description: Current aperture, in terms of f-stop (e.g. 2.8 for f2.8)

Variables.Name: CurrentFocusDistance
Variables.Description: Read-only. Control this value via FocusSettings.

Variables.Name: DefaultFilmbackPresetName
Variables.Description: Name of the default filmback preset

Variables.Name: DefaultLensPresetName
Variables.Description: Name of the default lens preset

Variables.Name: DefaultLensFocalLength
Variables.Description: Default focal length (will be constrained by default lens)

Variables.Name: DefaultLensFStop
Variables.Description: Default aperture (will be constrained by default lens)

Functions.Name: GetHorizontalFieldOfView
Functions.Description: Returns the horizonal FOV of the camera with current settings.

Functions.Name: GetVerticalFieldOfView
Functions.Description: Returns the vertical FOV of the camera with current settings.

Functions.Name: GetFilmbackPresetName
Functions.Description: Returns the filmback name of the camera with the current settings.

Functions.Name: SetFilmbackPresetByName
Functions.Description: Set the current preset settings by preset name.

Functions.Name: GetLensPresetName
Functions.Description: Returns the lens name of the camera with the current settings.

Functions.Name: SetLensPresetByName
Functions.Description: Set the current lens settings by preset name.
